name: GPT-5.5 (Next-Gen)
creator: OpenAI
description: Pioneers extended agentic multi-step reasoning capabilities. Highly autonomous, and uses advanced test-time compute to solve multi-stage logical problems.

name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
creator: Anthropic
description: Widely considered the industry benchmark for developer tasks. Exceptional code generation, agentic routing logic, and complex system orchestration.

name: DeepSeek-R1
creator: DeepSeek
description: Advanced open-weights reasoning model using reinforcement learning. Features visualizable reasoning chains, extreme cognitive reflection, and top-tier code/logic generation.

name: DeepSeek-V3
creator: DeepSeek
description: State-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture. Delivers top-tier code completion and mathematical logical deduction at a fraction of standard API costs.

name: GPT-4o
creator: OpenAI
description: OpenAI's flagship multimodal model. Optimized for high-speed API execution, parallel function calling, and structured JSON tool-use parameters.

name: Claude 4.8 Opus (Next-Gen)
creator: Anthropic
description: Anthropic's ultimate model. Designed for complex system analysis, deep software development projects, and highly autonomous business agent workflows.

name: Gemini 1.5 Pro
creator: Google
description: Features an ultra-large context capability. Ideal for ingesting entire software repositories, hours of video, or large databases directly into active prompt context.

name: Llama 3.1 405B
creator: Meta
description: The largest dense open-weights model of its generation. Ideal for on-premise deployments, synthetic data generation pipelines, and local model distillation.

name: Qwen 2.5 72B
creator: Alibaba
description: Highly optimized for multilingual operations, agentic reasoning, and complex JSON schemas. Its specialized 'Coder' variant is a leading local coding assistant.

name: Mistral Large 2
creator: Mistral
description: European-designed model optimized for single-node execution. Exceptional multilingual context parsing (80+ languages) and native function call capability.
